headline: Argus Upgrade Frames AutoZone Expansion As Potential Earnings Turning Point
summary: Argus Research has upgraded AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) to Buy after two quarters of negative earnings growth. The firm points to store and international expansion as key drivers behind its improved view. Argus expects profit growth by fiscal Q3 2026, describing the call as a potential turning point in AutoZone's story. AutoZone enters this upgrade with its shares at $3,672.68 and a mixed recent track record, including an 11.2% gain year to date but a 5.4% decline over the past week. Over longer...

headline: AutoZone To Rally Around 17%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Tuesday
summary: Analysts change outlook on top names: Truist cut KFY price target, Oppenheimer raised AZO target, B. Riley slashed YEXT target, Stifel cut MTN target, RBC raised KNTK target, Truist cut MAA target, Wells Fargo raised XENE target, Citigroup raised HIMS target.

headline: Oppenheimer Reiterates Outperform on AutoZone, Raises Price Target to $4300
summary: Oppenheimer  analyst Brian Nagel   reiterates AutoZone (NYSE:AZO) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $4150 to $4300.
